items.title: Salesforce.com (CRM) Rises As Market Takes a Dip: Key Facts
items.description: In the latest trading session, Salesforce.com (CRM) closed at $199.44, marking a +1.56% move from the previous day.

items.title: Salesforce Stock Is Battered, and Super Cheap. Hang Tight.
items.description: It’s difficult to know when  Salesforce’s  stock will recover, but it is extremely cheap, no matter how one looks at it.  At this point, the selling in software has become extreme by historical standards, bringing Salesforce down.  Almost no software name is immune, and Salesforce certainly hasn’t been.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Wednesday Recap: AMD, Super Micro, Chipotle
items.description: ↘️ Uber (UBER): The ride-hailing company said quarterly profit fell and gave conservative guidance, as it named a new finance chief. Shares closed down around 5%. ↘️ New York Times (NYT): The media company reported higher quarterly profit as a decline in news-only subscription revenue was offset by sales to subscribers buying bundles and other single products.

items.title: PTC Inc. (PTC) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
items.description: PTC Inc. (PTC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +20.47% and +7.43%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: Software ate the world. Now, Wall Street is worried AI will eat software.
items.description: Investors have quickly moved to sell shares of companies that looked like they could be on the menu
